Lvl30.Name: Darkside
Lvl30.Desc: While under the effect of Darkside, you may spend 2 MP when you score a direct hit on an enemy with a single-target ability to treat any roll of 1, 2, or 3 as if it were a 0 and any roll of 4, 5, or 6 as if it were a 10 when determining damage. Darkside is removed at the end of your next turn if the effect is not renewed.

Lvl30.Name: Combo
Lvl30.Desc: After resolving the effects of an ability with Combo, you may use one of the specified abilities at any point during your turn. You may move before doing so, and may choose a new target when using this additional ability.

Lvl50.Name: Walking Dead
Lvl50.Desc:
While under the effect of Walking Dead, your abilities restore 2d6 + 6 HP for each enemy they damage when they score a direct hit. Walking Dead is removed when your HP equals your Max HP. At the end of your turn, if Walking Dead has not been removed, your HP is reduced to 0, and you are Knocked Out.
After attaining level 60, the amount of HP your abilities restore increases to 2d6 + 8 HP.

Lvl60.Name: Enhanced Enmity
Lvl60.Desc: Enemies that you have Enmity on incur a -8 penalty on all ability checksthat do not target you.

Lvl30.Name: Dark Force
Lvl30.Trigger: Immediately before an effect that deals damage or inflicts enfeeblements is resolved
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Prevents all damage and enfeeblements that the triggered Dark Force inflicts on the target.

Lvl40.Name: Dark Force
Lvl40.Trigger: Immediately before an effect that deals damage or inflicts enfeeblements is resolved
Lvl40.BaseEffect: Prevents all damage and enfeeblements that the triggered Dark Force inflicts on the target.

Lvl50.Name: Dark Force
Lvl50.Trigger: Immediately before an effect that deals damage or inflicts enfeeblements is resolved
Lvl50.BaseEffect: Prevents all damage and enfeeblements that the triggered Dark Force inflicts on the target.

Lvl55.Name: Dark Force
Lvl55.Trigger: Immediately before an effect that deals damage or inflicts enfeeblements is resolved
Lvl55.BaseEffect: Prevents all damage and enfeeblements that the triggered Dark Force inflicts on the target.

Lvl60.Name: Dark Force
Lvl60.Trigger: Immediately before an effect that deals damage or inflicts enfeeblements is resolved
Lvl60.BaseEffect: Prevents all damage and enfeeblements that the triggered Dark Force inflicts on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Dark Knight Combo (Hard Slash + Syphon Strike)
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target. Restores 1 MP. Combo: Souleater

ComboAbilities.Name: Souleater
ComboAbilities.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target. Restores 2 HP.
ComboAbilities.DirectHit: Direct Hit: Deals an additional 1d6 damage

Lvl30.Name: Unleash
Lvl30.Range: A 5x5 area centered on this character

Lvl30.Name: Unmend
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 3 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Rampart
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Reduce the damage you take from abilties by 2 until the start of your next turn.

Lvl30.Name: Low Blow
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Stuns the target until the end of this turn.

Lvl30.Name: Flood of Darkness
Lvl30.Range: A 3x3 area adjacent to this character
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage to all targets and grants Darkside.

Lvl30.Name: Provoke
Lvl30.Trigger: When an enemy begins their turn
Lvl30.Target: The enemy that triggered this ability

Lvl30.Name: Interject
Lvl30.Trigger: When an adjacent enemy uses an invoked ability, or is using an invoked ability to generate a marker
Lvl30.Target: The enemy that triggered this ability
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Interrupts the invoked ability that triggered Interject, negating it completely.

Lvl30.Name: Reprisal
Lvl30.Trigger: Immediately before an ability used by an enemy within 2 squares is resolved
Lvl30.Range: A 5x5 area centered on this character
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Reduces the damage dealt by the abilities of all targets by 2 until the end of this round.
